description: • Building intelligent systems for healthcare and enterprise — LLM applications, RAG pipelines, AI agents, FastAPI backends
• Designing voice AI workflows optimized for production deployment and monitoring
• Owning end-to-end delivery from model integration through API design to deployment
• Co-founded an adaptive AI tutoring platform for Ghanaian JHS/SHS learners
• Architected scalable stack: Next.js frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL, sub-600ms streaming voice (Deepgram, Groq, OpenAI TTS)
• Built live voice tutoring (Cascade pipeline), risk dashboards, and GES-aligned curriculum
• Contributing to AI and NLP technologies advancing the African tech ecosystem
• Building practical, locally-relevant systems focused on real-world impact
